creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
Beyond my mention of the symptom: a case such as mine might be extremely difficult, or impossible, to reproduce. 

Compared to 2013 comment 0, 

> How-To-Repeat: Attach USB Flash drive and detach.

– my case, a trio of USB memory sticks for removable persistent L2ARC, is almost certainly very different. The feature did not reach OpenZFS until 2020, and (maybe I'm mistaken) I don't recall it being a feature of FreeBSD ZFS prior to OpenZFS. 

<https://github.com/openzfs/zfs/pull/9582>

> Persistent L2ARC by gamanakis · Pull Request #9582 · openzfs/zfs

HTH, feel free to close again.
